summary:
All tests passed! ✅

## Summary

**The Needle:** A port mismatch in `/etc/nginx/sites-available/default`.

| | Port |
|---|---|
| Flask backend (`server.py`) | **5000** |
| Nginx `proxy_pass` (buggy) | **5001** ❌ |
| Nginx `proxy_pass` (fixed) | **5000** ✅ |

Nginx was proxying `/api/` requests to port `5001`, but the Flask app was listening on port `5000`. This caused nginx to return a `502 Bad Gateway` for all `/api/data` requests. The fix was a one-character change: `5001` → `5000`.
